programme.title: Endless Fortune Fashion
programme.desc: For women who crave more than fast fashion. New to TVSN. This range is bold, ageless and individual. Endlessly wearable forward-thinking designs within a story of its own.

programme.title: Florence Bohemia Fashion
programme.desc: Express your individuality with Florence Bohemia Fashion. Featuring flowing fabrics and artistic details. This collection brings effortless elegance and free spirited style to every occasion.

programme.title: Pilates Pro Chair
programme.desc: Low impact workout delivers results without the aches and pains from lifting weights and running on treadmills. Does this sound like you? It's time you try the Pilates Pro Chair!

programme.title: The Jocks
programme.desc: The Jocks steps inside the world of elite riders Tommy Berry and Chad Schofield--two athletes who soared to early success, only to be derailed by life-changing setbacks. Now, we follow their fight to rebuild.

programme.desc: The host presents some of the latest news stories, current affairs and developments pertaining to economics, politics and sports.

programme.desc: The host presents information pertaining to business and economic developments from around the world and provides updates on current events.

programme.desc: The host shares detailed economic and sociopolitical updates from Asia and sheds light on significant national and international events.

programme.title: Top Stories
programme.desc: The host presents some of the latest news stories, current affairs and developments pertaining to economics, politics and sports.

programme.title: Turbulence
programme.desc: As the altitude climbs, the stakes climb higher, as worlds collide in a basket in the sky. 2026. United Kingdom, United States. Director: Claudio Fah. Starring: Hera Hilmar, Jeremy Irvine.

programme.title: Show Home
programme.desc: Explore the failures of the human condition, sometimes you must go down before you can go back up. 2023. NZ. Director: Jane Shearer. Starring: Miriama McDowell, Kip Chapman.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Years after Ingrid and Martha's career paths diverged, their paths meet again. 2024. Spain, United States. Director: Pedro Almodovar. Starring: Julianne Moore, Tilda Swinton.

programme.title: All We Imagine As Light
programme.desc: In Mumbai, three nurses grow closer as they navigate loss, longing, and hardships. 2024. India. Director: Payal Kapadia. Starring: Kani Kusruti, Divya Prabha, Chhaya Kadam.

programme.title: Godard Cinema
programme.desc: With over 60 years of cinema and 140 films under his belt, Jean-Luc Godard is one of the most renowned French New Wave artists of all time. 2022. France. Director: Cyril Leuthy.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/6. Opening night arrives, however, as the gala begins the night takes an unexpected turn. 2025. UK. Director: Hans Herbots. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: Sebastian
programme.desc: Max moonlights as an escort under the pseudonym 'Sebastian', as research for his upcoming Novel. 2024. UK, Sweden, Belgium. Director: Mikko Makela. Starring: Ruaridh Mollica, Hiftu Quasem.

programme.title: Late Shift
programme.desc: A kind hearted nurse in an understaffed ward is pushed to her limits in a race against time. 2025. Switzerland, Germany. Director: Petra Biondina Volpe. Starring: Leonie Benesch, Sonja Riesen.

programme.title: Marguerite's Theorem
programme.desc: A semi-autistic mathematics student must start anew when she makes a mistake on her final thesis. 2023. France. Director: Anna Novion. Starring: Ella Rumpf, Jean-Pierre Darroussin.

programme.title: Trespasses
programme.desc: 1/1. Cushla is stuck between two worlds, which is made no easier by Michael's arrival at her bar. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Dawn Shadforth. Starring: Lola Petticrew, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Trespasses
programme.desc: 1/2. Pressure at home and school grows, yet Cushla and Michael become more involved. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Dawn Shadforth. Starring: Lola Petticrew, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Trespasses
programme.desc: 1/3. Cushla and Michael's love deepens amid secrets and danger. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Dawn Shadforth. Starring: Lola Petticrew, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Trespasses
programme.desc: 1/4. Cushla seeks the truth, leading to a shocking climax for the Lavery's that unites them. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Dawn Shadforth. Starring: Lola Petticrew, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Rosalie
programme.desc: The life story of Rosalie, the star of the world's first bearded lady attraction. 2023. France. Director: Stephanie Di Giusto. Starring: Nadia Tereszkiewicz, Benoit Magimel.

programme.title: Godard Cinema
programme.desc: With over 60 years of cinema and 140 films under his belt, Jean-Luc Godard is one of the most renowned French New Wave artists of all time. 2022. France. Director: Cyril Leuthy.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/6. Opening night arrives, however, as the gala begins the night takes an unexpected turn. 2025. UK. Director: Hans Herbots. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: Late Shift
programme.desc: A kind hearted nurse in an understaffed ward is pushed to her limits in a race against time. 2025. Switzerland, Germany. Director: Petra Biondina Volpe. Starring: Leonie Benesch, Sonja Riesen.

programme.title: Marguerite's Theorem
programme.desc: A semi-autistic mathematics student must start anew when she makes a mistake on her final thesis. 2023. France. Director: Anna Novion. Starring: Ella Rumpf, Jean-Pierre Darroussin.

programme.title: Rosalie
programme.desc: The life story of Rosalie, the star of the world's first bearded lady attraction. 2023. France. Director: Stephanie Di Giusto. Starring: Nadia Tereszkiewicz, Benoit Magimel.

programme.title: Godard Cinema
programme.desc: With over 60 years of cinema and 140 films under his belt, Jean-Luc Godard is one of the most renowned French New Wave artists of all time. 2022. France. Director: Cyril Leuthy.

programme.title: Hundreds of Beavers
programme.desc: An applejack endeavours to trap 100's of beavers in order to become the greatest beaver trapper. 2022. USA. Director: Mike Cheslik. Starring: Ryland Brickson Cole Tews, Olivia Graves.

programme.title: Stolen Kisses
programme.desc: After being discharged from his military service, Antoine struggles with work as well as with love. 1968. France. Director: Francois Truffaut. Starring: Jean-Pierre Leaud, Claude Jade.

programme.title: Meet The Leroys
programme.desc: In order to quell marriage troubles, a man takes his wife and kids on a trip down memory lane. 2024. France. Director: Florent Bernard. Starring: Charlotte Gainsbourg, Jose Garcia.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/8. A fight for life and death follows, as the search for Gorski comes to a close. 2024. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man is haunted by an evil force that threatens to tear his life apart. 2023. Iceland. Director: Arro Stefansson. Starring: Hjortur Johann Jonsson, Heiddis Chadwick Hlynsdottir.

programme.title: Vaka
programme.desc: 1/1. An epidemic of insomnia spreads across Stockholm, and difficult choices must be made. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim.

programme.title: Vaka
programme.desc: 1/2. A new disaster forces Christian to act, and Moa's outburst has serious consequences. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim.

programme.title: Vaka
programme.desc: 1/3. Linda profits from the crisis. Elin fights for Moa's life. Christian gets more responsibility. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim.

programme.title: Vaka
programme.desc: 1/4. Elin battles the virus affecting her and Moa. Christian faces accusations, Hugo is threatened. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim.

programme.title: Vaka
programme.desc: 1/5. Stockholm becomes a war zone, Johannes executes the plan, and Elin grows desperate. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim.

programme.title: Vaka
programme.desc: 1/6. Linda and Isak flee while Christian seeks redemption. Elin joins a risky experiment. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim.

programme.title: Hundreds of Beavers
programme.desc: An applejack endeavours to trap 100's of beavers in order to become the greatest beaver trapper. 2022. USA. Director: Mike Cheslik. Starring: Ryland Brickson Cole Tews, Olivia Graves.

programme.title: Stolen Kisses
programme.desc: After being discharged from his military service, Antoine struggles with work as well as with love. 1968. France. Director: Francois Truffaut. Starring: Jean-Pierre Leaud, Claude Jade.

programme.title: Meet The Leroys
programme.desc: In order to quell marriage troubles, a man takes his wife and kids on a trip down memory lane. 2024. France. Director: Florent Bernard. Starring: Charlotte Gainsbourg, Jose Garcia.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/8. A fight for life and death follows, as the search for Gorski comes to a close. 2024. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man is haunted by an evil force that threatens to tear his life apart. 2023. Iceland. Director: Arro Stefansson. Starring: Hjortur Johann Jonsson, Heiddis Chadwick Hlynsdottir.

programme.title: Stolen Kisses
programme.desc: After being discharged from his military service, Antoine struggles with work as well as with love. 1968. France. Director: Francois Truffaut. Starring: Jean-Pierre Leaud, Claude Jade.

programme.title: Meet The Leroys
programme.desc: In order to quell marriage troubles, a man takes his wife and kids on a trip down memory lane. 2024. France. Director: Florent Bernard. Starring: Charlotte Gainsbourg, Jose Garcia.

programme.title: My Dying Place
programme.desc: In the tiny Canterbury settlement of Birdlings Flat, Patrick McNulty has found peace. 2024. New Zealand. Director: Loren Kett.

programme.title: Bax And Beyond
programme.desc: Explore Kylie Bax's meteoric rise to fame, with 13 international Vogue covers, she is New Zealand's first supermodel. 2024. New Zealand. Director: Neil Gussey.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: Five friends relive their teenage golden days at their favourite boy-band's show. 2023. UK, Greece. Director: Coky Giedroyc. Starring: Aisling Bea, Jayde Adams.

programme.title: Carmen Curlers
programme.desc: 1/1. Axel Byvang answers an ad from investors looking to fund an electric curler invention. 2023. Denmark. Director: Natasha Arthy. Starring: Morten Hee Andersen, Maria Rossing.

programme.title: When Fall Is Coming
programme.desc: After a mushroom related incident, a grandmother struggles under the weight of her guilt. 2024. France. Director: Francois Ozon. Starring: Helene Vincent, Josiane Balasko.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Lost Boys And Fairies
programme.desc: 1/1. Queer performance artist Gabriel and his partner Andy long to adopt a child. 2024. UK. Director: James Kent. Starring: Sion Daniel Young, Fra Fee.

programme.title: Lost Boys And Fairies
programme.desc: 1/2. With preparations for the adoption under way, a tragic event changes this new-found family's life forever. 2024. UK. Director: James Kent. Starring: Sion Daniel Young.

programme.title: Lost Boys And Fairies
programme.desc: 1/3. The repercussions of a catastrophic event sends Gabe spiralling, and the adoption is put into jeopardy. 2024. UK. Director: James Kent. Starring: Sion Daniel Young.

programme.title: High And Low: John Galliano
programme.desc: Examine the rapid rise and fall from grace, and journey forward for controversial fashion designer John Galliano. 2023. USA. Director: Kevin Macdonald.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: Five friends relive their teenage golden days at their favourite boy-band's show. 2023. UK, Greece. Director: Coky Giedroyc. Starring: Aisling Bea, Jayde Adams.

programme.title: Bax And Beyond
programme.desc: Explore Kylie Bax's meteoric rise to fame, with 13 international Vogue covers, she is New Zealand's first supermodel. 2024. New Zealand. Director: Neil Gussey.

programme.title: Carmen Curlers
programme.desc: 1/1. Axel Byvang answers an ad from investors looking to fund an electric curler invention. 2023. Denmark. Director: Natasha Arthy. Starring: Morten Hee Andersen, Maria Rossing.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: High And Low: John Galliano
programme.desc: Examine the rapid rise and fall from grace, and journey forward for controversial fashion designer John Galliano. 2023. USA. Director: Kevin Macdonald.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: Five friends relive their teenage golden days at their favourite boy-band's show. 2023. UK, Greece. Director: Coky Giedroyc. Starring: Aisling Bea, Jayde Adams.

programme.title: Carmen Curlers
programme.desc: 1/1. Axel Byvang answers an ad from investors looking to fund an electric curler invention. 2023. Denmark. Director: Natasha Arthy. Starring: Morten Hee Andersen, Maria Rossing.

programme.title: Flavors Of Iraq
programme.desc: A French-Iraqi journalist reflects on his father's journey from Iraq to France following his passing . 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Leonard Cohen.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: The Umbrellas Of Cherbourg
programme.desc: Genevieve and Guy's romance comes to an abrupt stop when Guy is drafted into the War. 1964. France. Director: Jacques Demy. Starring: Catherine Deneuve, Nino Castelnuovo.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time Michel Legrand
programme.desc: Rising to fame through the French New Wave, Michel Legrand's story is told with never-before-seen archives and personal accounts. 2024. France. Director: David Dessites.

programme.title: The People's Joker
programme.desc: An aspiring clown grappling with her gender identity combats a fascistic caped crusader. 2022. USA. Director: Vera Drew. Starring: Vera Drew, Lynn Downey, Kane Distler.
